content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

I accept the proposed amendment. The ignored CLI test is now out of sync with the current fail-closed lease-recovery contract and should be aligned to avoid false-positive coverage or brittle expectations.

## Votes

- `fr-14-355cf877`: Accept
  The amendment corrects a stale test that still expects resume success even when stale-worktree recovery cannot be proven. If the implementation now intentionally errors on partial cleanup, retaining the old assertion is inaccurate and masks contract changes. Updating the test to assert the new failure mode (or a true successful worktree-verified case) improves correctness, safety clarity, and long-term maintainability.
